creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #0)

Randomly picking one of the five, <https://people.freebsd.org/~blackend/doc/handbook/index.html> revision 48108 is also indexed and found (with an archive banner) at <https://docs.freebsd.org/doc/10.3-RELEASE/usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en/books/handbook/>. 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=a0f41809ca112eb4eb5e98f7d0921e65f7cb0ee2> and <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=44de4593873ab1e85e1487c2a8540262a3b09744> (2022-12-10) were: 

> Improve SEO of the Documentation Portal
> 
> * Remove SVN tag
> * Stop indexing the archive

I can't recall the query through which the archived version was found, sorry. It was almost certainly with Google.
